calibration.title: Compass Calibration
calibration.instructions: Improve accuracy by calibrating your device compass.
calibration.step1: Move your phone in a figure-8 pattern three times.
calibration.step2: Stay away from metal objects and magnets.
calibration.step3: Fine-tune with manual offset if needed.

welcome.title: How can I guide you today?
welcome.subtitle: Ask about prayer times, duas, ziyarat, Islamic history, and daily worship — with trusted references.

guardrails.blocked: I cannot help with that request.

prompts.ziyaratMuharramMessage: Which ziyarat should I read in Muharram?
prompts.whoHusaynMessage: Tell me about Imam Husayn and Karbala
prompts.quranReflectionMessage: Help me reflect on today's Quran verse

responses.greeting: Peace be upon you. Today is {{hijri}}. How may I guide you in worship, duas, ziyarat, or Islamic knowledge?
responses.prayer_guidance: Your next prayer is {{next}} at {{time}} (in {{countdown}}) in {{city}}. Times use the Jafari {{marja}} method. Maghrib includes the +17 min red twilight delay.
responses.dua_recommendation: Based on the time and season, here are {{count}} recommended duas from Mafatih al-Jinan. Tap to open the reader.
responses.ziyarat_recommendation: Here are {{count}} ziyarat suited to this occasion. Tap to read with translation and audio.
responses.calendar_today: Today ({{hijri}}): {{todayCount}} observance(s) on the Shia calendar. Muharram season: {{muharram}}.
responses.calendar_upcoming: Today is {{hijri}}. No major observance today — {{upcomingCount}} upcoming events on your calendar.
responses.fatwa_redirect: I cannot issue fatwa or personal religious verdicts. Please consult your marja's official rulings. I can share general educational information from Quran, hadith, and history.
responses.general_fallback: I don't have a specific answer bundled offline for that question. Try asking about prayer times, duas, ziyarat, Muharram, Imam Husayn (as), Ghadeer, or the Twelve Imams (as).

who_ahlulbayt.title: Ahlul Bayt (as)
who_ahlulbayt.body: Ahlul Bayt (as) are the purified family of Prophet Muhammad (s) — including Imam Ali, Sayyida Fatima, Imam Hasan, and Imam Husayn (peace be upon them all). Shia Muslims follow their teachings as the rightful interpreters of Islam after the Prophet (s).

twelve_imams.title: The Twelve Imams (as)
twelve_imams.body: After the Prophet (s), Shia Islam recognizes twelve divinely appointed Imams: Ali, Hasan, Husayn, Ali Zain ul-Abideen, Muhammad al-Baqir, Jafar al-Sadiq, Musa al-Kazim, Ali al-Rida, Muhammad al-Jawad, Ali al-Hadi, Hasan al-Askari, and Muhammad al-Mahdi (aj) — the awaited saviour.

karbala.title: Karbala & Ashura
karbala.body: On 10 Muharram 61 AH, Imam Husayn (as) was martyred at Karbala standing against tyranny. Ashura is the day of eternal mourning and renewal of allegiance to truth — not celebration.

ghadeer.title: Ghadeer Khum
ghadeer.body: On 18 Dhu al-Hijjah, at Ghadeer Khum, the Prophet (s) declared Imam Ali (as) as his successor — 'Whomever I am his master, Ali is his master.' This is Eid al-Ghadir for Shia Muslims.

fatwa.title: Fiqh & Fatwa
fatwa.body: Ahlulbayt+ AI provides educational content only. For wajib/mustahab/haram rulings, always refer to your marja — e.g. Ayatullah Sistani or Ayatullah Khamenei official websites.

tawassul.title: Tawassul
tawassul.body: Tawassul means seeking nearness to Allah through the intercession of the Prophet (s) and Ahlul Bayt (as). Dua Tawassul is among the most beloved supplications in Shia tradition.

mahdi.title: Imam al-Mahdi (aj)
mahdi.body: Imam Muhammad al-Mahdi (aj), the twelfth Imam, entered minor occultation after the martyrdom of Imam Askari (as). Shia Muslims await his reappearance to establish justice on earth.

sahifa.title: Sahifa Sajjadiya
sahifa.body: The Psalms of Islam — 54 supplications by Imam Zain ul-Abideen (as), covering every aspect of spiritual life. It is known as the Zabur of Ahlul Bayt.

muharramMode.title: Muharram Mode
muharramMode.subtitle: Journey through Karbala — daily majlis, amaal & ziyarat.
muharramMode.subtitleActive: Sacred days of Muharram — honour Imam Husayn (as).
muharramMode.offline: Fully offline — all content bundled locally.
muharramMode.blackThemeOn: Deep black theme active across the app

d1.event: Islamic New Year — The Stand Begins
d1.eventDetail: On 1 Muharram 61 AH, the Hijri year begins as Imam Husayn (as) continues his journey toward Kufa, refusing to pledge allegiance to Yazid.
d1.majlisBody: The majlis reflects on why Imam Husayn (as) could not accept a tyrant as leader. Bay'ah to Yazid meant legitimising corruption — Husayn (as) chose honour over comfort, truth over survival.
d1.amalBody: Begin the sacred month with reflection and commitment to the path of Ahlul Bayt (as).
d1.amalSteps:
1. Ghusl if possible
2. Recite 100× Salawat
3. Recite Dua Tawassul
4. Give charity (Sadaqah)
5. Attend or listen to majlis

d2.eventDetail: The caravan of Imam Husayn (as) reaches the plains of Karbala on 2 Muharram. The land that would witness the greatest sacrifice in history.
d2.majlisBody: Majlis on the arrival at Karbala — the moment the earth of Karbala was chosen as the stage for the eternal lesson of truth against falsehood.
d2.amalBody: Commemorate the arrival of the Imam's caravan at the sacred land.
d2.amalSteps:
1. Recite Ziyarat Warith
2. Recite Surah Al-Fatiha for martyrs
3. 100× La hawla wa la quwwata
4. Recite Dua Nudba (excerpt)
5. Reflect on the Imam's journey

d3.eventDetail: Imam Husayn (as) establishes camp at Karbala. Hur ibn Yazid al-Riyahi arrives, torn between duty and conscience.
d3.majlisBody: The majlis explores Hur's inner struggle — representing every soul caught between fear and truth. His eventual repentance shows that it is never too late to choose Husayn (as).
d3.amalBody: Turn toward the Imam with sincere repentance.
d3.amalSteps:
1. Istighfar 70 times
2. Recite Ziyarat Warith
3. Pray 2 rak'at for tawba
4. Give charity in Husayn's name
5. Recite salawat 100×

d4.eventDetail: Umar ibn Sa'd's army surrounds the camp of Imam Husayn (as). The companions prepare for the inevitable.
d4.majlisBody: Majlis honouring the companions who chose martyrdom alongside the Imam — Christian monk Wahab, Muslim ibn Awsaja, and the faithful who stayed when others fled.
d4.amalBody: Remember those who stood firm when the world abandoned Husayn (as).
d4.amalSteps:
1. Recite Ziyarat Aminullah
2. Recite Dua Kumayl (evening)
3. 100× Salawat
4. Read about a companion of Karbala
5. Light a candle in remembrance

d5.eventDetail: The people of Kufa who invited the Imam betrayed him. Ibn Ziyad's army grows while support never arrives.
d5.majlisBody: The majlis examines how empty promises and cowardice led to the tragedy — a lesson on standing with truth when it is unpopular.
d5.amalBody: Pray for strength to remain loyal to Ahlul Bayt in difficulty.
d5.amalSteps:
1. Recite Ziyarat Warith
2. Surah Al-Kahf (1 section)
3. 100× Salawat
4. Avoid worldly entertainment
5. Attend majlis

d6.event: The Army of Ibn Ziyad Gathers
d6.eventDetail: Thousands surround the small camp of Imam Husayn (as). Shimr is sent with orders to demand bay'ah or battle.
d6.majlisBody: Yazid's forces offer safety in exchange for submission. The Imam's refusal — 'Death with dignity is better than life with humiliation' — echoes through history.
d6.amalBody: Reflect on choosing Allah's pleasure over worldly comfort.
d6.amalSteps:
1. Recite Ziyarat Ale Yasin
2. Dua Tawassul
3. 100× La ilaha illallah
4. Give sadaqah
5. Wear simple, modest clothing

d7.event: Water Cut Off — Day of Makhzi
d7.eventDetail: On 7 Muharram, access to the Euphrates is blocked. The camp of Imam Husayn (as) suffers thirst — foreshadowing the thirst of Ashura.
d7.majlisBody: Majlis on the cruelty of cutting water from women and children — Abbas (as) would later ride to the river, never to return.
d7.amalBody: Fast from water for part of the day in remembrance (if able).
d7.amalSteps:
1. Recite Ziyarat Ashura
2. Recite Dua Mashlool
3. Give water (Sabeel) in Imam's name
4. 100× Salawat
5. Avoid unnecessary eating/drinking until maghrib

d8.event: Eve of Battle — Abbas & the Companions
d8.eventDetail: The night before the final stand. Imam Husayn (as) speaks to his companions. Abbas (as), Ali Akbar (as), and Qasim prepare for martyrdom.
d8.majlisBody: The majlis on the last night — companions requesting martyrdom before the Imam, the children sleeping unaware, and the Imam's tears under the stars.
d8.amalBody: Spend the night in worship and remembrance.
d8.amalSteps:
1. Recite Ziyarat Warith
2. Night prayer (Namaz Shab)
3. 100× Salawat
4. Recite Quran — Surah Yasin
5. Stay awake in remembrance if able

d9.eventDetail: The ninth of Muharram. Companions spend their final night. Shimr mocks; the camp of truth prepares for the morning of Ashura.
d9.majlisBody: The most emotional majlis of Muharram — Sayyida Zainab (sa) gathering the women, the Imam granting permission for martyrdom, and the silence before the storm.
d9.amalBody: The recommended acts for the eve of Ashura.
d9.amalSteps:
1. Recite Ziyarat Ashura
2. Recite Dua Kumayl
3. 100× Salawat
4. Pray for martyrdom with the Imam
5. Attend Tasua majlis

d10.eventDetail: 10 Muharram 61 AH. Imam Husayn (as), his family, and 72 companions are martyred. The day that shook the heavens and earth.
d10.majlisBody: The central majlis of Muharram — from the first arrow to the last breath of Ali al-Asghar (as), from Abbas at the Euphrates to Husayn (as) alone on the field of Karbala.
d10.amalBody: The most important day of the year for the followers of Ahlul Bayt.
d10.amalSteps:
1. Fast (if able)
2. Recite Ziyarat Ashura
3. Recite Dua Mashlool
4. Attend majlis & processions
5. Give charity & serve others
6. Avoid worldly celebrations

d11.eventDetail: The women and children of the Prophet's household are taken captive. The heads of martyrs are raised on spears.
d11.majlisBody: Majlis on the suffering of Sayyida Zainab (sa) — the eloquent defender who spoke truth in the court of Yazid.
d11.amalBody: Honour the Lady who preserved the message of Karbala.
d11.amalSteps:
1. Recite Ziyarat Warith
2. 100× Salawat
3. Read sermon of Zainab in Shaam
4. Give charity to orphans
5. Avoid music & entertainment

d12.eventDetail: The captives are marched through towns. Some recognise the tragedy; others mock. The caravan of truth moves toward Damascus.
d12.majlisBody: The majlis on the humiliation inflicted on the Prophet's family — and how their dignity shone brighter through every trial.
d12.amalBody: Walk spiritually with the family of the Prophet (s).
d12.amalSteps:
1. Recite Ziyarat Jamia Kabira
2. Recite Dua Nudba
3. 100× Salawat
4. Reflect on Zainab's sermons
5. Serve the oppressed

d13.event: Burial of the Martyrs of Karbala
d13.eventDetail: On 13 Muharram, the people of Banu Asad bury the bodies of the martyrs. The earth of Karbala receives its treasure.
d13.majlisBody: The closing majlis of the first Ashura cycle — the bodies without heads, the soil mixed with blood, and the eternal resting place of the Master of Martyrs.
d13.amalBody: Close the ten days with renewed commitment to Husayn's mission.
d13.amalSteps:
1. Recite Ziyarat Warith
2. Visit graves if possible
3. 100× Salawat
4. Renew allegiance to Imam Husayn (as)
5. Plan ongoing remembrance through Safar

calendar.title: Islamic Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Shia Hijri observances — Wiladat, Shahadat, Muharram, Arbaeen, Ghadeer & Mubahila.
calendar.offline: Fully offline — dates follow the Islamic (Hijri) calendar.
calendar.muharramSubtitle: Sacred days of mourning for Imam Husayn (as)

amaal.muharram: Recite Ziyarat Ashura, attend majlis, and increase remembrance of Ahlul Bayt.
amaal.tasua: Prepare for Ashura — recite duas of Imam Husayn (as) and avoid worldly celebrations.
amaal.ashura: Fast if able, attend majlis, recite Ziyarat Ashura, and reflect on Karbala.
amaal.arbaeen: Recite Ziyarat Arbaeen, walk or support Arbaeen pilgrimage, and serve the visitors of Husayn (as).
amaal.wiladat: Recite salawat, give charity, and celebrate with gratitude to Allah.
amaal.midshaban: Recite Dua al-Mujir, Ziyarat of Imam Mahdi (aj), and prepare for Ramadan.
amaal.shahadat_ali: Recite Ziyarat Amir al-Muminin, attend programs, and reflect on Imam Ali's (as) sacrifice.
amaal.qadr: Stay in worship, recite Quran, and seek forgiveness in the blessed nights.
amaal.ghadeer: Recite Ghadeer khutbah, renew allegiance to Wilayat, and celebrate Eid al-Ghadir.
amaal.mubahila: Recite the verse of Mubahila and reflect on the status of Ahlul Bayt (as).
amaal.fatima: Recite Ziyarat Sayyida Fatima (sa), attend mourning programs, and increase salawat.

hijri_new_year.title: Islamic New Year
hijri_new_year.desc: First of Muharram marks the beginning of the Hijri year — a time of reflection and renewal.

husayn_arrives_karbala.title: Imam Husayn (as) Arrives at Karbala
husayn_arrives_karbala.desc: The caravan of Imam Husayn (as) reached the plains of Karbala on 2 Muharram 61 AH.

water_cutoff.title: Water Cut Off — Makhzaal
water_cutoff.desc: On 7 Muharram, access to water was blocked from the camp of Imam Husayn (as) and his companions.

tasua.title: Tasua — Eve of Ashura
tasua.desc: The ninth of Muharram, when companions of Imam Husayn (as) spent their final night before Ashura.

ashura.title: Ashura — Martyrdom of Imam Husayn (as)
ashura.desc: The tenth of Muharram, when Imam Husayn (as), his family, and companions were martyred at Karbala.

burial_martyrs.title: Burial of the Martyrs of Karbala
burial_martyrs.desc: The martyrs of Karbala were buried on 13 Muharram after the captives departed.

shahadat_zainulabideen.title: Shahadat of Imam Zain ul-Abideen (as)
shahadat_zainulabideen.desc: Commemoration of the passing of the fourth Imam, Ali ibn Husayn (as), the ornament of worshippers.

shahadat_imam_hasan_safar.title: Shahadat of Imam Hasan (as)
shahadat_imam_hasan_safar.desc: Commemoration of the martyrdom of Imam Hasan al-Mujtaba (as), the second Imam.

shahadat_imam_kazim.title: Shahadat of Imam Musa al-Kazim (as)
shahadat_imam_kazim.desc: The seventh Imam was martyred in the prison of Harun al-Rashid on 7 Safar.

arbaeen.title: Arbaeen — 40th Day After Ashura
arbaeen.desc: The fortieth day after Ashura, when millions walk to Karbala honoring Imam Husayn (as).

shahadat_prophet.title: Shahadat of Prophet Muhammad (s)
shahadat_prophet.desc: The passing of the Seal of Prophets, Muhammad ibn Abdullah (s), on 28 Safar.

shahadat_imam_hasan_28.title: Shahadat of Imam Hasan (as) — 28 Safar
shahadat_imam_hasan_28.desc: Shia tradition commemorates Imam Hasan (as) alongside the Prophet (s) on this day.

wiladat_imam_jawad.title: Wiladat of Imam Muhammad al-Jawad (as)
wiladat_imam_jawad.desc: Birth of the ninth Imam, Muhammad ibn Ali al-Jawad (as), in Medina.

shahadat_imam_askari.title: Shahadat of Imam Hasan al-Askari (as)
shahadat_imam_askari.desc: The eleventh Imam was martyred on 8 Rabi al-Awwal 260 AH.

wiladat_imam_askari.title: Wiladat of Imam Hasan al-Askari (as)
wiladat_imam_askari.desc: Birth of the eleventh Imam in Medina on 10 Rabi al-Awwal.

wiladat_prophet.title: Wiladat of Prophet Muhammad (s)
wiladat_prophet.desc: Birth of the Holy Prophet (s) — celebrated on 17 Rabi al-Awwal in Shia tradition.

wiladat_imam_sadiq.title: Wiladat of Imam Jafar al-Sadiq (as)
wiladat_imam_sadiq.desc: Birth of the sixth Imam, founder of the Ja'fari school of jurisprudence.

wiladat_imam_askari_rabi2.title: Wiladat of Imam Hasan al-Askari (as)
wiladat_imam_askari_rabi2.desc: Alternate commemoration of the birth of the eleventh Imam.

wiladat_zainulabideen.title: Wiladat of Imam Zain ul-Abideen (as)
wiladat_zainulabideen.desc: Birth of Ali ibn Husayn (as), the master of prostrators.

shahadat_sayyida_fatima.title: Shahadat of Sayyida Fatima al-Zahra (sa)
shahadat_sayyida_fatima.desc: Commemoration of the martyrdom of the Lady of the Worlds, daughter of the Prophet (s).

wiladat_imam_kazim.title: Wiladat of Imam Musa al-Kazim (as)
wiladat_imam_kazim.desc: Birth of the seventh Imam, Musa ibn Jafar al-Kazim (as).

wiladat_imam_baqir.title: Wiladat of Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (as)
wiladat_imam_baqir.desc: Birth of the fifth Imam, the splitter of knowledge.

shahadat_imam_hadi.title: Shahadat of Imam Ali al-Hadi (as)
shahadat_imam_hadi.desc: The tenth Imam was martyred on 3 Rajab.

wiladat_imam_hadi.title: Wiladat of Imam Ali al-Hadi (as)
wiladat_imam_hadi.desc: Birth of the tenth Imam in Medina.

wiladat_imam_jawad_rajab.title: Wiladat of Imam Muhammad al-Jawad (as)
wiladat_imam_jawad_rajab.desc: Birth of the ninth Imam, celebrated in the month of Rajab.

wiladat_imam_ali.title: Wiladat of Imam Ali (as)
wiladat_imam_ali.desc: Birth of Amir al-Muminin Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) inside the Kaaba on 13 Rajab.

wiladat_imam_hasan_rajab.title: Wiladat of Imam Hasan (as)
wiladat_imam_hasan_rajab.desc: Birth of the second Imam, Hasan al-Mujtaba (as).

shahadat_imam_kazim_rajab.title: Shahadat of Imam Musa al-Kazim (as)
shahadat_imam_kazim_rajab.desc: Commemoration of the martyrdom of the seventh Imam in Rajab.

mabath.title: Mab'ath — Prophetic Mission
mabath.desc: The day Prophet Muhammad (s) received his first revelation and began his mission.

wiladat_imam_husayn.title: Wiladat of Imam Husayn (as)
wiladat_imam_husayn.desc: Birth of the master of martyrs, Imam Husayn ibn Ali (as), on 3 Sha'ban.

wiladat_abbas.title: Wiladat of Abu al-Fadhl al-Abbas (as)
wiladat_abbas.desc: Birth of the standard-bearer of Imam Husayn (as), al-Abbas ibn Ali (as).

wiladat_zainulabideen_shaban.title: Wiladat of Imam Zain ul-Abideen (as)
wiladat_zainulabideen_shaban.desc: Birth of the fourth Imam in Sha'ban.

wiladat_ali_asghar.title: Wiladat of Ali al-Asghar (as)
wiladat_ali_asghar.desc: Birth of the infant martyr of Karbala, Abdullah al-Radhi (as).

wiladat_imam_mahdi.title: Wiladat of Imam al-Mahdi (aj)
wiladat_imam_mahdi.desc: Birth of the twelfth Imam on 15 Sha'ban — the promised saviour of humanity.

wiladat_imam_hasan_ramadan.title: Wiladat of Imam Hasan (as)
wiladat_imam_hasan_ramadan.desc: Birth of the second Imam, celebrated in the blessed month of Ramadan.

shahadat_imam_ali.title: Shahadat of Imam Ali (as)
shahadat_imam_ali.desc: The first Imam was struck in the mihrab and martyred on 21 Ramadan 40 AH.

laylat_qadr.title: Laylat al-Qadr
laylat_qadr.desc: One of the blessed nights of Qadr in the last ten days of Ramadan.

eid_fitr.title: Eid al-Fitr
eid_fitr.desc: Celebration marking the end of the blessed month of Ramadan.

shahadat_imam_sadiq.title: Shahadat of Imam Jafar al-Sadiq (as)
shahadat_imam_sadiq.desc: The sixth Imam passed away on 15 Shawwal 148 AH.

wiladat_imam_reza.title: Wiladat of Imam Ali al-Rida (as)
wiladat_imam_reza.desc: Birth of the eighth Imam in Medina on 11 Dhu al-Qi'dah.

shahadat_imam_jawad.title: Shahadat of Imam Muhammad al-Jawad (as)
shahadat_imam_jawad.desc: The ninth Imam was martyred on 29 Dhu al-Qi'dah.

eid_adha.title: Eid al-Adha
eid_adha.desc: The festival of sacrifice on 10 Dhu al-Hijjah.

ghadeer.title: Eid al-Ghadir — Ghadeer Khum
ghadeer.desc: On 18 Dhu al-Hijjah, the Prophet (s) declared Imam Ali (as) as his successor at Ghadeer Khum.

mubahila.title: Day of Mubahila
mubahila.desc: On 24 Dhu al-Hijjah, the Prophet (s) took Imam Ali, Sayyida Fatima, Hasan, and Husayn (as) for Mubahila.

ziyarat.title: Ziyarat
ziyarat.subtitle: Sacred visitations — immersive reading with audio, offline ready.
ziyarat.searchPlaceholder: Search ziyarat by name, imam, or occasion…

masoomeen.title: 14 Masoomeen
masoomeen.subtitle: Biographies, timelines, quotes, events, and books — offline knowledge of Ahlul Bayt (as).

hadith.subtitle: Search traditions from Nahjul Balagha, Al-Kafi, and Bihar ul Anwar — with references and AI summaries.

sources.nahjulDesc: Sermons, letters, and sayings of Imam Ali (as)
sources.kafiDesc: Usul and Furu al-Kafi by Shaykh al-Kulayni
sources.biharDesc: Ocean of Lights — encyclopedia by Allama Majlisi

settings.title: Intelligent Notifications
settings.subtitle: Context-aware reminders for prayer, events, duas, Muharram, amaal, and fasting.

categories.prayerDesc: Salah times, preparation and smart reminders
categories.eventsDesc: Wiladat, Shahadat, Eids, and calendar occasions
categories.duasDesc: Kumayl, morning duas, and recommended supplications
categories.amaalDesc: Tasbih, salawat, and seasonal recommended acts
categories.fastingDesc: Sunnah fasts, Ashura, Arafah, and Ramadan

today.title: {{event}}
today.body: Today is {{event}}. Open the calendar for amaal and details.

eve.title: Tomorrow: {{event}}
eve.body: {{event}} is tomorrow. Prepare with duas and amaal.

kumail.title: Dua Kumayl tonight
kumail.body: Thursday night — recite Dua Kumayl for forgiveness.

sabah.title: Morning dua
sabah.body: Start your day with Dua al-Sabah.

tawassul.title: Dua Tawassul
tawassul.body: Friday — seek intercession through Ahlul Bayt (as).

ahad.title: Dua Ahad
ahad.body: Recite Dua Ahad and renew your covenant with Imam Mahdi (aj).

tasbih.title: Daily dhikr
tasbih.body: Take a moment for tasbih and remembrance of Allah.

salawat.title: Friday salawat
salawat.body: Increase salawat upon the Prophet (s) and Ahlul Bayt (as).

qadr.title: Laylat al-Qadr amaal
qadr.body: Ramadan nights — engage in recommended worship and duas.

ghadeer.title: Ghadeer approaching
ghadeer.body: Prepare for Eid al-Ghadeer — celebrate Wilayah of Imam Ali (as).

monday.title: Sunnah fast — Monday
monday.body: Consider fasting today for spiritual reward.

thursday.title: Sunnah fast — Thursday
thursday.body: Thursday is among the recommended days to fast.

ashura.title: Ashura fast tomorrow
ashura.body: Prepare to fast on the Day of Ashura in remembrance of Imam Husayn (as).

arafah.title: Fast of Arafah tomorrow
arafah.body: Recommended fast on the 9th of Dhu al-Hijjah.

ramadan.title: Ramadan begins tomorrow
ramadan.body: Prepare for the blessed month of fasting and Quran.

daily.title: Muharram reminder
daily.body: Open Muharram Mode for today's Karbala events, majlis, and amaal.

ashuraEve.title: Tasu'a — eve of Ashura
ashuraEve.body: Prepare for the Day of Ashura. Recite Ziyarat and amaal.

arbaeen.title: Arbaeen approaching
arbaeen.body: 40 days after Ashura — plan ziyarat and Arbaeen walk if possible.

day.title: Muharram Day {{day}}
day.body: Day {{day}} of Muharram — view today's events and amaal.

premium.title: Premium
premium.headline: AhlulBayt+ Premium
premium.subtitle: Unlock the full spiritual companion — AI guidance, advanced Quran search, cloud sync, and exclusive content.
premium.legal: Subscriptions auto-renew unless cancelled. Manage in App Store or Google Play settings.

ai.title: AI Islamic Assistant
ai.desc: Cloud-powered answers with scholarly citations and personalized guidance.

advancedQuran.title: Advanced Quran Search
advancedQuran.desc: Hybrid semantic search across the full Quran corpus on our servers.

cloudSync.title: Cloud Sync
cloudSync.desc: Sync bookmarks, qadha, and reading progress across all your devices.

exclusiveContent.title: Exclusive Content
exclusiveContent.desc: AI hadith summaries, premium translations, and curated collections.

status.label: Subscription
status.freeDesc: Upgrade for AI, advanced search, cloud sync, and exclusive content.

errors.purchaseFailed: Purchase could not be completed. Please try again.
errors.verifyFailed: We could not verify your purchase. Contact support if charged.
errors.noPurchases: No previous purchases found for this account.

welcome.title: Welcome to AhlulBayt+
welcome.subtitle: Your companion for prayer, Quran, and the path of Ahlul Bayt (as).
welcome.verse: Indeed, I am leaving among you two precious things: the Book of Allah and my household.

features.quran: Quran, duas, and ziyarat — offline ready

language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: You can change this anytime in Settings.

madhab.title: Your marja al-taqlid
madhab.subtitle: This sets default prayer calculation and religious guidance sources.
madhab.footer: You can update your marja later in Settings. AhlulBayt+ does not issue fatwa.

location.title: Enable location
location.subtitle: For accurate prayer times and qibla direction where you are.
location.privacy: Your location stays on your device. We never sell your data.

benefits.prayer: Precise Jafari prayer times for your city
benefits.qibla: Qibla compass calibrated to your position
benefits.calendar: Hijri dates adjusted for your region

notifications.title: Stay on time
notifications.subtitle: Gentle adhan reminders so you never miss a prayer.
notifications.footer: Adhan is scheduled on your device — works offline.
notifications.previewBody: It is time for Dhuhr prayer.

interests.title: What matters to you?
interests.subtitle: We'll personalize your home screen and recommendations.
interests.footer: Select at least one to continue.

ai.title: AI companion
ai.subtitle: Ask AhlulBayt+ about history, Quran, and the teachings of the Imams (as).
ai.personalizeSubtitle: Tailor topics based on your interests
ai.note: AI provides educational answers with citations — not religious rulings. Consult your marja for fiqh.
ai.disclaimer: By continuing, you agree to our respectful use policy for AI features.

welcome.title: Sign in to AhlulBayt+
welcome.subtitle: Sync your progress, bookmarks, and preferences across devices.
welcome.guestNote: Guest mode works offline. Sign in anytime to sync.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in with your email and password.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send reset instructions.
forgot.sent: Check your email for an OTP and reset token (dev: see API console).

otp.title: Verify code
otp.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.

insights.title: My Insights
insights.subtitle: Your spiritual habits over the last {{days}} days
insights.localSubtitle: Activity on this device over the last {{days}} days
insights.localOnly: Sign in with an account to sync insights across devices.
insights.signInRequired: Sign in to view personalized retention, prayer, and reading insights.
insights.loadError: Could not load insights. Try again later.
